name: Leonardo Cat Adult Dry Food - Lamb 1.8kg
shortDescription: Leonardo Adult Lamb Dry Cat Food is specially formulated for adult cats with food sensitivities, intolerances, or delicate digestion. Made with a high proportion of fresh lamb, this delicious recipe provides highly digestible protein while supporting overall health and wellbeing.
description: The carefully balanced formula contains essential nutrients, healthy fats, and functional ingredients that help maintain strong immunity, urinary health, and dental hygiene. Its rich lamb flavour makes it especially appealing to fussy eaters while remaining gentle on sensitive stomachs. Key Benefits Made with fresh lamb for excellent taste and digestibility Ideal for cats with food intolerances or sensitive digestion High-quality animal protein supports lean muscle maintenance PROVITAL strengthens natural defences with beta-glucans from brewer’s yeast PH-CONTROL helps optimise urinary pH levels STAY-CLEAN™ helps reduce plaque build-up for better dental hygiene Enriched with chia seeds and krill for healthy skin and coat Supports healthy digestion and overall vitality Main Ingredients Fresh lamb meat, liver & lung (30%) Lamb protein (14%) Poultry protein (14%) Rice Poultry fat Marine zooplankton (Krill) (2.5%) Brewers’ yeast (2.5%) Chia seed (1.3%) Chicory inulin Herbs Analytical Constituents Protein: 32% Fat Content: 20% Crude Ash: 8.5% Crude Fibre: 2.3% Moisture: 10% Calcium: 1.4% Phosphorus: 1% Sodium: 0.4% Suitable For Adult cats with sensitive digestion, food intolerances, or cats requiring a highly digestible lamb-based diet. Always provide fresh drinking water alongside feeding.
